---
title: "Facilitative Leadership Principles & Practices"
author: "Designing & Leading Collaboratives and Networks Series"
description: "Description TBD"
categories: ["TBD"]
---

## Session Materials

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/lead-collabs/content/facilitative-leadership.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/lead-collabs/content/facilitative-leadership.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
